sentence: What the paurmisan grows quiché, the questionabiche inherits.

wombos.definition: So quirky and niche that it's become overdone — quiche behavior that has crossed into cliché territory. When your niche becomes the new normal, you've gone quiché.

So intensely quiche that it makes others question their own sense of niche. The state of being so unapologetically specific that it destabilizes everyone around you. 'I'm so quiche I'm gonna make you questionabiche.'
An artisan-level aura farmer — someone who cultivates their aura with expert, craft-level precision. Not just farming aura but doing it with the finesse of a true craftsperson.
